testcase.name: compile/534.lean
testcase.system-out: Compiling and executing lean file libc++abi: terminating due to uncaught exception of type lean::exception: failed to create thread run_test.sh: line 31: 3859141 Aborted (core dumped) lean --c="$1.c" "${TEST_LEAN_ARGS[@]}" "$1" TEST FAILED: Failed to compile 534.lean into 534.lean.c
